problem id: f4925854
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11010010 -> 10010000
  11100110 -> 11110101
  10010011 -> 00000010
  01110001 -> 11111110
  11011111 -> 10001001
  01111101 -> 11100101
  10110110 -> 01000001
  11011001 -> 10000100
  00011110 -> 00111011
  01010101 -> 10111111

query: 10111001
predicted answer: 01011100
